summary: Iteration 12: WebSocket Module & Advanced Partner Analytics testing. All 16 backend tests passed. Frontend verified: Partner Dashboard with 'Analytics Pro' button, Advanced Analytics page loads with KPIs, charts (recharts), tabs, and tier info.

integration_issues.issue: Browser WebSocket connection fails with 'WebSocket is closed before the connection is established' - works when tested via Python websockets client. Likely Cloudflare/CDN proxy issue with WebSocket upgrade headers.
integration_issues.note: WebSocket backend endpoint works correctly - issue is browser/proxy specific

issues: Recharts console warnings about width/height -1 - charts still render correctly, minor styling issue

passed_tests: ✅ Auth: POST /api/auth/register - creates user with 100 points welcome bonus
✅ Auth: POST /api/auth/login - authenticates and returns token
✅ WebSocket: /api/ws/notifications/{user_id} - endpoint registered (tested via Python websockets - returns init message)
✅ WebSocket: /api/ws/ride/{ride_id} - endpoint registered for ride tracking
✅ WebSocket: /api/ws/chat/{ride_id} - endpoint registered for ride chat
✅ Partner: POST /api/partners/register - registers new partner with basico tier
✅ Partner: GET /api/partners/analytics/advanced - returns full analytics with KPIs, charts, top_services, transactions
✅ Partner: GET /api/partners/analytics - basic analytics still works
✅ Partner: GET /api/partners/dashboard - returns partner stats and tier info
✅ Rides: POST /api/rides/request - creates ride with driver assignment (MOCKED)
✅ Partner Tiers: GET /api/partners/tiers - returns basico/premium/enterprise tiers
✅ Frontend: Partner Dashboard loads with Analytics Pro button
✅ Frontend: Advanced Analytics page loads with 5 KPI cards, tabs, charts
✅ Frontend: Dashboard notification button present (WebSocket hook integrated)
action_items: OPTIONAL: Investigate browser WebSocket connection failure - may need proxy configuration for WSS upgrade headers
OPTIONAL: Fix recharts width/height warnings by adding explicit min dimensions to chart containers
critical_code_review_comments: WebSocket module (websocket_module.py) properly implements ConnectionManager for multi-user connections
Advanced Analytics endpoint (/api/partners/analytics/advanced) returns comprehensive KPI data with charts structure
Frontend useWebSocket.js hooks correctly transform ws:// URL from REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL
PartnerAdvancedAnalytics.jsx correctly uses recharts for BarChart, LineChart, AreaChart, PieChart
Dashboard.jsx integrates useNotifications hook for real-time notification badge

Driver assignment - random names from predefined list
Chat auto-reply from driver - random Portuguese responses
